notes.hypothesis: After all four probes are wiped and allowed to air dry, the readings should approach each probe's dry-air endpoint. Repeating the wipe/dry process may reveal whether additional dry headroom remains.
notes.method: All four probes were actively wiped and left in air-dry/open-bench condition. A 60 s capture at 0.5 s cadence was recorded with no intentional water contact.
notes.findings: Dry readings were stable. Medians were s1 2975, s2 3119, s3 3121, s4 3058 raw ADC. Ranges were narrow, about 7-10 counts per channel.
notes.conclusion: This run established a first full-wipe dry-air endpoint set. s1 remained lower than the other dry probes, so follow-up wipe checks were appropriate before treating these as final dry maxima.
